name: feattech-monorepo
description: FeatTech Software Studio - Monorepo de aplicaciones y sitios corporativos

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:landing"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/padel-server && npm run build -w apps/padel-client && npm run build -w apps/featwebs-landing
